basic_details.job_title: IIM Mumbai Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Mumbai (IIM Mumbai), an Institute of National Importance and an autonomous Institution under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, has released an official advertisement for Management Trainee and Management Trainee (Admin) positions.

important_dates.selection process date: Will be communicated to shortlisted candidates via email

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years; extendable up to 35 years for Ph.D. candidates or candidates with relevant experience. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD as per Central Government rules. | Working Hours: 09:00 AM to 05:30 PM, 6 days a week (Sunday off). Candidates may be required to work beyond office hours or on holidays as per Institute need without extra remuneration. | Other Conditions: Only Indian citizens are eligible. No campus accommodation will be provided. No TA/DA for attending the selection process. No rounding off of percentage marks is allowed.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by IIM Mumbai: | Management Trainee: Master's degree in the relevant area with 60% marks or above, or a B.Tech or equivalent professional degree from a recognized institution. Preference will be given to candidates pursuing or intending to pursue doctoral (Ph.D.) studies. Management Trainee (Admin): Master's degree with 60% marks or above, or a B.Tech or equivalent professional degree from a recognized institution. Preference to Ph.D. pursuing/intending candidates. Experience (Both Posts): Prior experience in higher education institutions, EdTech organizations, academic research, admissions, counselling, or student support services will be an added advantage. | Strong communication, interpersonal, and coordination skills. Proficiency in MS Office, internet applications, and ERP systems. Good command over written and spoken English and Hindi. Ability to multitask, work under timelines, and maintain confidentiality. Adaptability and flexibility during examinations and institutional events.

salary_details.total vacancies: 10 Posts (6 Management Trainee + 4 Management Trainee Admin)
salary_details.initial tenure: 1 Year (Extendable year-to-year up to 3 more years)
salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process:
Visit the official IIM Mumbai careers page: https://iimmumbai.ac.in/careers.
Fill out the online application form completely with accurate details. No rounding off of percentage marks is permitted.
Provide a valid and active email ID, as all communications regarding the selection process will be sent exclusively via email.
Submit the online application on or before June 16, 2026 by 5:00 PM.
Regularly check the IIM Mumbai website (www.iimmumbai.ac.in) for updates, amendments, and corrigendum.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is June 16, 2026, by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 10 total vacancies, including 6 Management Trainee and 4 Management Trainee (Admin) posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Management Trainee at IIM Mumbai?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹35,000 to ₹45,000, along with additional allowances such as housing, travel, and mobile reimbursement.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IIM Mumbai Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 32 years, extendable up to 35 years for Ph.D. candidates or those with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree with at least 60% marks or a B.Tech/equivalent degree from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q6. Is prior experience required for IIM Mumbai Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: Experience is not mandatory, but prior experience in higher education, EdTech, research, admissions, or student support will be an advantage.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contract for Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The initial contract is for 1 year, extendable year-to-year up to 3 additional years based on performance.
